name: The Sweetest Dog Around

name: Citizen's Rocky
description: The design pays tribute to Macomb’s heritage and features iconic scenes from around Macomb.

name: Doodle Dog
sponsor: Josh & Mishelle Oaks, Ryan & Ann Ford
description: Rocky is adorned with a series of complex, yet elegant purple and gold doodles that use the contours of the bulldog to find pattern, rhythm, and texture.

name: Foundation Rocky
description: The design ties in the purple and gold flowers indigenous to the region and features a large purple Rocky Paw on each of its sides.

name: Four Seasons
description: The design of this four-season Rocky begins with the spring season across his chest and stretches through summer, fall, and winter down the length of the bulldog. Look closely and you will see that this Rocky includes actual paw prints from locally adopted pets.

name: Patriotic Rocky
description: This patriotic Rocky pays homage to our military services with official military seals of the Army, Navy, Marine Corps, Air Force, and Coast Guard on one side and the corresponding service logos on the other side.

name: Paws
description: The design includes more than 130 Rocky paw prints, varying in sizes, shapes, and colors.

name: Phantom Rocky
description: A variety of sculpture techniques that include applying broken eggshells to create this stately, tuxedo wearing Phantom of the Opera Rocky.

name: Rocky the Dali Dog
sponsor: Macomb Area Chamber of Commerce & Downtown Development
description: The design is inspired by Surrealist artist Salvador Dali and his most famous work, “Persistence of Memory.” Rocky the Dali Dog features the famous melting clocks, the crawling ants, and, yes, the Dali mustache.

name: Sports Corner Rocky
description: Sports Corner Rocky is a multiple sport athlete featuring graphic representations of all WIU and Macomb High School sports.

name: Starry Night
description: This Alpha Rocky takes its base theme from Vincent Van Gogh’s masterpiece, “Starry Night,” and incorporates Sherman Hall, the WIU water tower, Thompson Hall, and the Macomb Courthouse.

name: The Van Gogh Rocky
description: The design is inspired by the works of Vincent Van Gogh and places Rocky in a field of purple daisies and gold sunflowers. This Rocky greets visitors at the State Farm office of Tom Conklin.

name: Untitled
sponsor: John & Dana Biernbaum, Joe Roselieb, and Colonel Rock III
description: The design features a classic purple and gold ribbon pattern that weaves through a swirling black print.
